scripts.dev:assets: nodemon --watch src --watch tailwind.config.js --watch postcss.config.js --watch vite.config.cjs --watch tsconfig.json --watch contour-preview.html --ignore _site/ --ignore .obsidian-build/ --ignore assets/ -e ts,css,html,js -x "npm run build"
scripts.dev:content: nodemon --watch collections --watch pages --watch _config.yml --watch _layouts --watch _includes -e md,html,yml -x "npm run build:content"
